key_dungeons.name: Lost Tomb
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Lost Tomb. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Lost Tomb of evil and secure the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.

game_log: Aeron the Shopkeeper: Rats! Rats have infested my shop's basement. Not just any rats, but Giant Rats. Can you kill them? All of them! I will reward you. I promise.
Aeron the Shopkeeper: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Juno: Does my breath smell like cat food?
Stan the Shopkeeper: Welcome to the General Store
Stan the Shopkeeper: walk up to a counter if you want to buy stuff.
Quest 'Rats': Kill the Basement Rats - Complete!
Quest 'Rats': Kill the Deep Tunnel Rats - Complete!
Quest 'Rats': Kill the Grumpy Goblin - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Aeron the Shopkeeper: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold

Alek: Our brave warriors have been unable to stop the advanced of the Goblin Army. They are hiding in their stronghold to the north and west. Can you root them out, destroy them, and retrieve the lost King's Sword?
Alek: No worries. Come back if you change your mind.
Lucian: The mage guild has lost the Dark Crystal in the Grotto. If you can bring this back to me, I will make it worth your while  [ENTER]
Lucian: No worries. Come back if you change your mind.
